//: FIX 2 — paste this hooks block into .claude/settings.json (merge with any existing hooks). The Stop hook fires when Larry finishes a turn; bridge-ingest.mjs reads the hook JSON on stdin (session_id, transcript_path), extracts the last instruction + Larry's response, and idempotently ingests one pending Tower turn. CONTROL_PLANE_DEV_DATABASE_URL must be in the session env. Use an ABSOLUTE path to bridge-ingest.mjs. Exits 0 always (never blocks the session).
